pypi.command: cd /srv/jtel-stack/packages/snaft && python3 -m build && python3 -m twine upload dist/snaft-<version>*

docker.command: docker build -t humotica/snaft:<version> -t humotica/snaft:latest . && docker push humotica/snaft:<version> && docker push humotica/snaft:latest

github.command: git push origin main && git push origin v<version>
